creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to David Black from comment #0)

> core.txt file attached.

I don't see an attachment, sorry. 

With eleven years since the report, the transition to OpenZFS, and so on, we might reasonably assume that this bug was overcome by events. 

----

Maybe of interest, the fairly recent linked issue in GitHub: 

> Panic on zfs receive · Issue #13598 · openzfs/zfs
